hooks.command:
node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const r=execSync('npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1',{encoding:'utf-8',timeout:60000});console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Type check passed.'}))}catch(e){const out=(e.stdout||'').split('
').slice(0,15).join('
');console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Type check failed. Fix errors before committing:
'+out}))}"
